revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: 「'''天山社'''（てんざんしゃ）・'''天山神社'''（てんざんじんじゃ）は[[神社]]。[[佐賀県]]にある[[天山 (佐賀県)|]]に…」
revision.text:
'''天山社'''（てんざんしゃ）・'''天山神社'''（てんざんじんじゃ）は[[神社]]。[[佐賀県]]にある[[天山 (佐賀県)|天山]]に鎮座し、[[肥前国]][[一宮|三宮]]と伝えられる。[[法人登記|登記]]上の[[宗教法人]]名称としては4社が存在する。
* [[天山神社 (小城市小城町畑田)]] - 天山山頂に鎮座する上宮。佐賀県小城市小城町畑田鎮座。 * [[天山社]] - 下宮・本宮とされる。佐賀県小城市小城町晴気鎮座。 * [[天山神社 (小城市小城町岩蔵)]] - 下宮。佐賀県小城市小城町岩蔵鎮座。 * [[天山神社 (唐津市)]] - 下宮。佐賀県唐津市厳木町広瀬鎮座。
{{曖昧さ回避}} {{デフォルトソート:てんさんしんしや}} [[Category:同名の神社]] [[Category:三宮 (社格)]]
#redirect[[en:Tenzan Shrine]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]

'''Tenzan Shrine''' (天山社 or 天山神社) refers to a group of {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社}} located in {{ill|Saga Prefecture|ja|佐賀県}} on {{ill|Tenzan (Saga Prefecture)|ja|天山}}. These shrines are traditionally regarded as the third shrine (三宮) of {{ill|Hizen Province|ja|肥前国}}. There are four registered religious corporations under this name.
* {{ill|Tenzan Shrine (Ogimachi Hatada)|ja|天山神社 (小城市小城町畑田)}} - Upper Shrine (上宮) located at the summit of Tenzan. Situated in Hatada, Ogimachi, Saga Prefecture. * {{ill|Tenzan Shrine (Main Shrine)|ja|天山社}} - Known as the Lower Shrine (下宮) or Main Shrine (本宮). Located in Haruki, Ogimachi, Saga Prefecture. * {{ill|Tenzan Shrine (Ogimachi Iwakura)|ja|天山神社 (小城市小城町岩蔵)}} - Lower Shrine (下宮). Situated in Iwakura, Ogimachi, Saga Prefecture. * {{ill|Tenzan Shrine (Karatsu City)|ja|天山神社 (唐津市)}} - Lower Shrine (下宮). Located in Hirose, Kyūragi Town, Karatsu City, Saga Prefecture.
{{Disambiguation}}
{{DEFAULTSORT:Tenzan Shrine}} [[Category:Shrines with identical names]] [[Category:Original pages]] [[Category:Hizen Province shrines]] [[Category:Three Shrines (shrine rank)]] [[Category:refresh]] [[Category:dd]] [[Category:Tenzan Shrine]] [[Category:mass bump]] [[ja:天山神社]] [[simple:user:immanuelle/天山神社]]

* {{ill|Tenzan Shrine (Ogimachi Hatada)|ja|天山神社 (小城市小城町畑田)}} - Upper Shrine (上宮) located at the summit of Tenzan. Situated in Hatada, Ogimachi, Saga Prefecture. * {{ill|Tenzan Shrine (Main Shrine)|ja|天山社}} - Known as the Lower Shrine (下宮) or Main Shrine (本宮). Located in Haruki, Ogimachi, Saga Prefecture. * {{ill|Tenzan Shrine (Ogimachi Iwakura)|ja|天山神社 (小城市小城町岩蔵)}} - Lower Shrine (下宮). Situated in Iwakura, Ogimachi, Saga Prefecture. * {{ill|Tenzan Shrine (Karatsu City)|ja|天山神社 (唐津市)}} - Lower Shrine (下宮). Located in Hirose, Kyūragi Town, Karatsu City, Saga Prefecture.
{{Disambiguation}}

revision.text:
'''Tenzan Shrine''' (天山社 or 天山神社) refers to a group of {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社|12=draft}} located in {{ill|Saga Prefecture|ja|佐賀県|12=draft}} on {{ill|Tenzan (Saga Prefecture)|ja|天山|12=draft}}. These shrines are traditionally regarded as the third shrine (三宮) of {{ill|Hizen Province|ja|肥前国|12=draft}}. There are four registered religious corporations under this name.
* {{ill|Tenzan Shrine (Ogimachi Hatada)|ja|天山神社 (小城市小城町畑田)|12=draft}} - Upper Shrine (上宮) located at the summit of Tenzan. Situated in Hatada, Ogimachi, Saga Prefecture. * {{ill|Tenzan Shrine (Main Shrine)|ja|天山社|12=draft}} - Known as the Lower Shrine (下宮) or Main Shrine (本宮). Located in Haruki, Ogimachi, Saga Prefecture. * {{ill|Tenzan Shrine (Ogimachi Iwakura)|ja|天山神社 (小城市小城町岩蔵)|12=draft}} - Lower Shrine (下宮). Situated in Iwakura, Ogimachi, Saga Prefecture. * {{ill|Tenzan Shrine (Karatsu City)|ja|天山神社 (唐津市)|12=draft}} - Lower Shrine (下宮). Located in Hirose, Kyūragi Town, Karatsu City, Saga Prefecture.
{{Disambiguation}}
{{citation needed|Tenzan Shrine}} [[simple:user:immanuelle/天山神社]]

revision.comment: Bot: single‑shot reformat + ill→|12=draft + draft categories + iws + DEFAULTSORT + move HTML comments + meta‑cat check
Removing from [[Category:Pages without meta categories]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "|12=draft" to "|qq=draft"
1 revision imported: Bot: import full history from ja:天山神社 up to rev 71069100
revision.text:
'''天山社'''（てんざんしゃ）・'''天山神社'''（てんざんじんじゃ）は[[神社]]。[[佐賀県]]にある[[天山 (佐賀県)|天山]]に鎮座し、[[肥前国]][[一宮|三宮]]と伝えられる。[[法人登記|登記]]上の[[宗教法人]]名称としては4社が存在する。
* [[天山神社 (小城市小城町畑田)]] - 天山山頂に鎮座する上宮。佐賀県小城市小城町畑田鎮座。 * [[天山社]] - 下宮・本宮とされる。佐賀県小城市小城町晴気鎮座。 * [[天山神社 (小城市小城町岩蔵)]] - 下宮。佐賀県小城市小城町岩蔵鎮座。 * [[天山神社 (唐津市)]] - 下宮。佐賀県唐津市厳木町広瀬鎮座。
{{曖昧さ回避}} {{デフォルトソート:てんさんしんしや}} [[Category:同名の神社]] [[Category:三宮 (社格)]]

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[天山神社]] to [[Tenzan Shrine]] without leaving a redirect: Bot: merge import
revision.text:
'''天山社'''（てんざんしゃ）・'''天山神社'''（てんざんじんじゃ）は[[神社]]。[[佐賀県]]にある[[天山 (佐賀県)|天山]]に鎮座し、[[肥前国]][[一宮|三宮]]と伝えられる。[[法人登記|登記]]上の[[宗教法人]]名称としては4社が存在する。
* [[天山神社 (小城市小城町畑田)]] - 天山山頂に鎮座する上宮。佐賀県小城市小城町畑田鎮座。 * [[天山社]] - 下宮・本宮とされる。佐賀県小城市小城町晴気鎮座。 * [[天山神社 (小城市小城町岩蔵)]] - 下宮。佐賀県小城市小城町岩蔵鎮座。 * [[天山神社 (唐津市)]] - 下宮。佐賀県唐津市厳木町広瀬鎮座。
{{曖昧さ回避}} {{デフォルトソート:てんさんしんしや}} [[Category:同名の神社]] [[Category:三宮 (社格)]]

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[commons:Category:Tenzan-jinja]][[ja:天山神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q60988677]] Wikidata name: Tenzan-jinja [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:55, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Tenzan Shrine''' (天山社 or 天山神社) refers to a group of [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrines]] located in [[:en:Saga Prefecture|Saga Prefecture]] on [[:en:Tianshan (disambiguation)|Tenzan (Saga Prefecture)]]. These shrines are traditionally regarded as the third shrine (三宮) of [[:en:Hizen Province|Hizen Province]]. There are four registered religious corporations under this name.
* {{ill|Tenzan Shrine (Ogimachi Hatada)|ja|天山神社 (小城市小城町畑田)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenzan Shrine (Ogimachi Hatada)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Upper Shrine (上宮) located at the summit of Tenzan. Situated in Hatada, Ogimachi, Saga Prefecture. * {{ill|Tenzan Shrine (Main Shrine)|ja|天山社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenzan Shrine (Main Shrine)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Known as the Lower Shrine (下宮) or Main Shrine (本宮). Located in Haruki, Ogimachi, Saga Prefecture. * {{ill|Tenzan Shrine (Ogimachi Iwakura)|ja|天山神社 (小城市小城町岩蔵)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenzan Shrine (Ogimachi Iwakura)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Lower Shrine (下宮). Situated in Iwakura, Ogimachi, Saga Prefecture. * {{ill|Tenzan Shrine (Karatsu City)|ja|天山神社 (唐津市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenzan Shrine (Karatsu City)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Lower Shrine (下宮). Located in Hirose, Kyūragi Town, Karatsu City, Saga Prefecture.
{{Disambiguation}}
{{translated page|ja|天山神社|version=71069100|comment=Imported full ja history}}

[[Category:All disambiguation pages]] }}

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[sn:commons:Category:Tenzan-jinja]][[ja:天山神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q60988677]] Wikidata name: Tenzan-jinja [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:55, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Tenzan Shrine''' (天山社 or 天山神社) refers to a group of [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrines]] located in [[:en:Saga Prefecture|Saga Prefecture]] on [[:en:Tianshan (disambiguation)|Tenzan (Saga Prefecture)]]. These shrines are traditionally regarded as the third shrine (三宮) of [[:en:Hizen Province|Hizen Province]]. There are four registered religious corporations under this name.
* {{ill|Tenzan Shrine (Ogimachi Hatada)|ja|天山神社 (小城市小城町畑田)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenzan Shrine (Ogimachi Hatada)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Upper Shrine (上宮) located at the summit of Tenzan. Situated in Hatada, Ogimachi, Saga Prefecture. * {{ill|Tenzan Shrine (Main Shrine)|ja|天山社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenzan Shrine (Main Shrine)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Known as the Lower Shrine (下宮) or Main Shrine (本宮). Located in Haruki, Ogimachi, Saga Prefecture. * {{ill|Tenzan Shrine (Ogimachi Iwakura)|ja|天山神社 (小城市小城町岩蔵)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenzan Shrine (Ogimachi Iwakura)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Lower Shrine (下宮). Situated in Iwakura, Ogimachi, Saga Prefecture. * {{ill|Tenzan Shrine (Karatsu City)|ja|天山神社 (唐津市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenzan Shrine (Karatsu City)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Lower Shrine (下宮). Located in Hirose, Kyūragi Town, Karatsu City, Saga Prefecture.
{{disambiguation}}[[Category:Short pages to be excluded since they are disambiguations]]
{{translated page|ja|天山神社|version=71069100|comment=Imported full ja history}}

revision.comment: Add page with conflicting Wikidata QIDs
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[commons:Category:Tenzan-jinja]][[ja:天山神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[commons:Category:Tenzan-jinja]][[ja:天山神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[sn:commons:Category:Tenzan-jinja]][[ja:天山神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q60988677]] Wikidata name: Tenzan-jinja [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:55, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Tenzan Shrine''' (天山社 or 天山神社) refers to a group of [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrines]] located in [[:en:Saga Prefecture|Saga Prefecture]] on [[:en:Tianshan (disambiguation)|Tenzan (Saga Prefecture)]]. These shrines are traditionally regarded as the third shrine (三宮) of [[:en:Hizen Province|Hizen Province]]. There are four registered religious corporations under this name.
* {{ill|Tenzan Shrine (Ogimachi Hatada)|ja|天山神社 (小城市小城町畑田)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenzan Shrine (Ogimachi Hatada)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Upper Shrine (上宮) located at the summit of Tenzan. Situated in Hatada, Ogimachi, Saga Prefecture. * {{ill|Tenzan Shrine (Main Shrine)|ja|天山社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenzan Shrine (Main Shrine)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Known as the Lower Shrine (下宮) or Main Shrine (本宮). Located in Haruki, Ogimachi, Saga Prefecture. * {{ill|Tenzan Shrine (Ogimachi Iwakura)|ja|天山神社 (小城市小城町岩蔵)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenzan Shrine (Ogimachi Iwakura)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Lower Shrine (下宮). Situated in Iwakura, Ogimachi, Saga Prefecture. * {{ill|Tenzan Shrine (Karatsu City)|ja|天山神社 (唐津市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenzan Shrine (Karatsu City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Lower Shrine (下宮). Located in Hirose, Kyūragi Town, Karatsu City, Saga Prefecture.
{{disambiguation}}[[Category:Short pages to be excluded since they are disambiguations]]

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[co:commons:Category:Tenzan-jinja]][[ja:天山神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[co:commons:Category:Tenzan-jinja]][[ja:天山神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:天山神社]]
'''Tenzan Shrine''' (天山社 or 天山神社) refers to a group of {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrines|1=Shinto shrine}} located in {{ill|Saga Prefecture|en|Saga Prefecture|WD=Q160420|lt=Saga Prefecture|1=Saga Prefecture}} on {{ill|Tianshan (disambiguation)|en|Tianshan (disambiguation)|WD=Q1305751|lt=Tenzan (Saga Prefecture)|1=Tianshan (disambiguation)}}. These shrines are traditionally regarded as the third shrine (三宮) of {{ill|Hizen Province|en|Hizen Province|WD=Q906926|lt=Hizen Province|1=Hizen Province}}. There are four registered religious corporations under this name.
* {{ill|Tenzan Shrine (Ogimachi Hatada)|ja|天山神社 (小城市小城町畑田)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenzan Shrine (Ogimachi Hatada)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Upper Shrine (上宮) located at the summit of Tenzan. Situated in Hatada, Ogimachi, Saga Prefecture. * {{ill|Tenzan Shrine (Main Shrine)|ja|天山社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenzan Shrine (Main Shrine)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Known as the Lower Shrine (下宮) or Main Shrine (本宮). Located in Haruki, Ogimachi, Saga Prefecture. * {{ill|Tenzan Shrine (Ogimachi Iwakura)|ja|天山神社 (小城市小城町岩蔵)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenzan Shrine (Ogimachi Iwakura)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Lower Shrine (下宮). Situated in Iwakura, Ogimachi, Saga Prefecture. * {{ill|Tenzan Shrine (Karatsu City)|ja|天山神社 (唐津市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenzan Shrine (Karatsu City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Lower Shrine (下宮). Located in Hirose, Kyūragi Town, Karatsu City, Saga Prefecture.
